message: feat: add chrisdietr 'most powerful personal OS' quote

files.patch:
@@ -606,5 +606,10 @@
     "quote": "Time from 'Oh that's neat' to 'I have bought @clawdbot a computer'... 2 days :) New metric for utility of a platform?",
     "author": "JonathanHaas",
     "url": "https://x.com/JonathanHaas/status/2014524860480028867"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Meanwhile @clawdbot shipping open source in a week the most powerful personal OS the world has seen, used by thousands. 714k lines of code. Beautifully structured to learn, use and adapt. You can touch it and use it now. Not in the future and not behind a paywall.",
+    "author": "chrisdietr",
+    "url": "https://x.com/chrisdietr/status/2013083638938911208"
   }
 ]
\ No newline at end of file
